signals.headline: Germany March 2026 Inflation Confirmed at +2
signals.raw:
Germany March 2026 Inflation Confirmed at +2.7% | YES | HIGH confidence**  
Germany's consumer price index rose to +2.7% year-on-year in March 2026, the highest since January 2024 (+2.9%), driven by a +7.2% surge in energy prices amid the Iran war; this exceeded February's +1.9% and pre-war expectations near 2%[1][2].

signals.headline: **Blockade Escalation**: The US has imposed a blockade on Iranian shipping in the Strait of Hormuz, targeting Iranian oi
signals.raw: **Blockade Escalation**: The US has imposed a blockade on Iranian shipping in the Strait of Hormuz, targeting Iranian oil tankers while allowing other international transit under monitoring[3].

signals.headline: **Iran's Red Lines Conflict**: Expert analysis indicates fundamental incompatibility between US and Iranian positions—th
signals.raw: **Iran's Red Lines Conflict**: Expert analysis indicates fundamental incompatibility between US and Iranian positions—the US demands removal of Iran's enriched uranium stockpile, while Iran appears unwilling to concede this[3].
